original_text:
### Graphic Elements — Waves
- Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**; each in **long and short** variants.
- Construction: top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue) — always preserve the layered, translucent quality.
- Usage: alone, or overlaid on photography or gradient backgrounds; to support layout flow, frame content, or add depth. Approved color values only.
- **Masthead gradient with logo mark** (Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.

relations.note: Usage guidance applies to the wave device defined by the construction rule.

quotes: Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**
top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue)
Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**; each in **long and short** variants.
always preserve the layered, translucent quality

rules.intent: Preserve the signature layered translucent wave device using only approved colorways.
rules.rule_text: Wave graphic elements come in two approved colorways — Sunshine/Gold (base #faa31b, top layer Gold @70%) and Sky Blue/Deep Blue (base #003D74, top layer Sky Blue @70%) — each with long and short variants. Construction always layers the top wave at 70% transparency (wave.top_layer.opacity = 0.7) over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue); always preserve the layered, translucent quality.

quotes: Usage: alone, or overlaid on photography or gradient backgrounds; to support layout flow, frame content, or add depth. Approved color values only.

rules.intent: Guide flexible but on-brand deployment of the wave device.
rules.rule_text: Waves may be used alone or overlaid on photography or gradient backgrounds — to support layout flow, frame content, or add depth. Use approved color values only.

quotes: **Masthead gradient with logo mark** (Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.
is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions

rules.intent: Standardize the masthead treatment for copy-bearing header positions.
rules.rule_text: The masthead gradient with logo mark (masthead.gradient = Sunshine #faa31b → light gold #ffe05c, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.
